causal_question: When a district first nominated an Asian, Black, or Latino/Hispanic major-party general-election nominee, how did the district's share of contributions from donors of that same ethnoracial group change between the adjacent pre (2000) - and post (2002)-nomination elections?
vague_question: If a district nominates its first Asian, Black, or Latino/Hispanic nominee, does the share of donations from donors of that same group change afterward?
